mkdir -p $WORK/b001/exe/
cd .
GOROOT='/usr/lib/go' /usr/lib/go/pkg/tool/linux_amd64/link -o $WORK/b001/exe/a.out -importcfg $WORK/b001/importcfg.link -installsuffix shared -X=runtime.godebugDefault=containermaxprocs=0,cryptocustomrand=1,decoratemappings=0,tlssecpmlkem=0,tlssha1=1,updatemaxprocs=0,urlstrictcolons=0,x509sha256skid=0 -buildmode=pie -buildid=ms3AXpCQGzldIgQ0ccIV/Dc306KeKXrNXWfL3sUil/JMqfkC_PKoAkOCW3dI1l/ms3AXpCQGzldIgQ0ccIV -X github.com/containerd/containerd/v2/version.Version=v2.2.2 -X github.com/containerd/containerd/v2/version.Revision=301b2dac98f15c27117da5c8af12118a041a31d9 -X github.com/containerd/containerd/v2/version.Package=github.com/containerd/containerd/v2 -extld=x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-gcc $WORK/b001/_pkg_.a
go tool buildid -w $WORK/b001/exe/a.out # internal
mkdir -p bin/
cp $WORK/b001/exe/a.out bin/gen-manpages
rm -rf $WORK/b001/
